body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `CHANGELOG.md:4`
`Compared with version 25.0.0`.
The current version on `main` is `25.1.0-beta.1`, so this release (`25.1.0-beta.2`) should compare with `25.1.0-beta.1`, not `25.0.0`. The tool skipped over the previous beta and compared against the last stable, which misrepresents the delta.
**Fix:** Update the comparison base from `25.0.0` to `25.1.0-beta.1`, and report the issue in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

**1 tool issue found** for `@azure/arm-containerservice` `25.1.0-beta.2`.

The `CHANGELOG.md` incorrectly compares with `25.0.0` (the last stable) instead of `25.1.0-beta.1` (the previous beta currently on `main`). No public API design issues were found — the client name (`ContainerServiceClient`) is unchanged, the new API version (`2026-02-02-preview`) is strictly newer than the one on `main` (`2026-01-02-preview`), and `KnownVersions` correctly includes the new preview entry.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":38212,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/containerservice/arm-containerservice/CHANGELOG.md","line":4,"issueType":"tool","category":"changelog-comparison-base","description":"25.1.0-beta.2 compares with 25.0.0 instead of 25.1.0-beta.1 (previous beta on main)"}]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- ❌ **UnitTest** (all environments — ubuntu_22x_node, windows_20x_node): Stale test recordings. The tests request `api-version=2026-02-02-preview` but recordings were made against `api-version=2026-01-02-preview`. Action: Re-record tests or skip with maintainer approval. See the [test guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md#run-tests-in-record-mode). Review [ADO logs](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/public/_build/results?buildId=6178352&view=results).
- ⏳ **checkenforcer**: still running (waiting for all checks to pass).
